goal: Pull the directory structure and codebase, read through the architecture, identify inefficiencies (tight routing, duplicated reasoning, missing capabilities), and document findings for later review or Scite research questions.

plan_steps.description: Pull the directory structure and codebase, read through the architecture, identify inefficiencies (tight routing, duplicated reasoning, missing capabilities), and document findings for later review or Scite research questions.

spoken_summary: I've pulled the directory structure and codebase, reviewed the architecture, and identified several inefficiencies including tight routing constraints, duplicated reasoning patterns, and missing capabilities around context persistence and multi-step planning. I've documented all the findings for your review and any future Scite research.
